parsed.summary: This commit adds an interactive menu to the /glm:setup command when already configured, and renames the npm scope. The changes are limited to documentation (commands/setup.md), metadata (package.json, plugin configs), a changelog, and release notes. There are no executable code changes — no logic, auth, state mutation, or runtime behavior to exploit. The setup command is a Claude slash-command defined in markdown, not executable source. No material ship-blocking defects found.
